spells.name: Fireball
spells.description:
- 3d6 damage to one target.
 - Causes the Burning status.
 Can set fire to flammable objects.

spells.name: Lightning
spells.description:
- 2d6 damage to d4 targets.
 - Can electrify puddles, and power magical devices.

spells.name: Force Pull
spells.description:
- 2d4 damage to one target, pulling the target towards you and making you their target.
 - Can be used to pickpocket targets, or undress an unarmored target.

spells.name: Force Push
spells.description:
- 2d4 damage to one target, pushing them away from the caster and making them prone.
 - Can be used to trigger traps, push over heavy objects, or lift willing humanoids up to second story windows.

spells.name: Paralyse
spells.description: - 1d10 damage to one target, causing them to miss 1d4 turns.

spells.name: Flash Freeze
spells.description:
- Restrain a target until the target rolls a DC12 dice challenge to break free.
 - Does no damage itself but any damage dealt to the frozen target is multiplied by 2, until it unfreezes.
 - Can be used to create slippery surfaces, freeze water, create barriers of ice, etc.

spells.name: Adrenaline
spells.description:
- Gives yourself or an ally 1 Exertion Use.
- If used on an allied NPC, allows them to take an immediate Combat Action.

spells.name: Raise Dead
spells.description:
- Revives a recently dead creature to serve you.
- Maintains it's abilities and states from when it was alive.
- Lasts until its death.

spells.name: Magic Shackles
spells.description:
- 2d6 damage to one target every round while in effect.
- The target must use two Tactical Actions to move around.
- Lasts until you next take damage.

spells.name: Mass Paralyse
spells.description: - 2d10 damage to d6 targets causing them to miss 1d4 turns.

spells.name: Heal
spells.description:
- 2d8 Life to one target.
- Can be used to tame wounded animals, or convince humanoid enemies to stop fighting.

spells.name: Group Heal
spells.description:
- 1d8 Life to d4 targets.
- Can be used to pacify bar brawls, or cult bloodletting rituals.

spells.name: Shield
spells.description:
- 2d8 bonus Armor to 1 target for 1 round.
 Can be cast on opposite walls to create a magic barrier.

spells.name: Charm
spells.description:
- Temporarily turns 1 hostile enemy to your side for 1d8 rounds.
- Adds 2d8 to a Disposition check.
- The target will obey all your commands to the best of their ability.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.description:
- The target misses their turn for d6 rounds. Any damage wakes them up.
- Can be used to keep a sleeping enemy asleep, allowing Stealth checks to automatically succeed.

spells.name: Sunbeam
spells.description:
- 2d8 damage to an Adjacent enemy, and 1d8 damage to a Far or Distant enemy.
- Causes Blindness to both targets for 1 turn.

spells.name: Enchant Weapon / Armour
spells.description:
- Adds d6+your Level in damage to yours or an ally's weapon, or adds d6+your Level to yours or an ally's armour.
- Roll the d6 buff after successfully casting this spell, then use that number for the duration of the spell.
- Lasts 24 hours.

spells.name: Resurrect
spells.description:
- Revive a recently dead humanoid creature back to full health as a zombie.
- Target might not appreciate this.

spells.name: Enthrall
spells.description:
- Turns 1 hostile target to your side. Every 24 hours, the target can attempt to resist, DC12.
- The target will obey all your commands to the best of their ability.

spells.name: Big Sleep
spells.description: - Applies the Sleep spell to 2d6 targets.
